front: What is the role of albumin as a drug delivery vehicle?
back: Albumin (66 kDa) has long half-life (19 days) due to FcRn recycling. Abraxane (nab-paclitaxel) uses albumin nanoparticles. Albumin-drug conjugates and albumin-binding strategies extend half-life. Albumin accumulates in tumors via transcytosis (gp60) and EPR.
